headline: Persian Gulf Disruption And Cease Fire Shape CF Industries Outlook
summary: Blockage of the Persian Gulf is disrupting fertilizer trade routes and raising concerns about a shortfall in global nitrogen supply. This disruption has drawn attention to CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) as a large producer of ammonia and nitrogen based fertilizers. A newly negotiated cease fire between the U.S. and Iran could restore shipping flows and ease some current pricing pressure in fertilizer markets. These geopolitical shifts are emerging as a fresh factor for CF Industries that...

headline: Cease-Fire Sparks Slide in CF Industries, Fertilizer Stocks
summary: The prospect of a Middle East cease-fire has shares of U.S. fertilizer producer CF Industries down around 9% and headed for their worst day since 2022. The Northbrook, Ill.-based company has been one of the year’s hottest stocks, lifted to records by investors' bets that CF could raise prices for its fertilizers to match those of global competitors, which must offset higher natural-gas prices, even as access to U.
